mapper.select: SELECT * FROM amz_replenishment_override WHERE sid = #{sid} AND seller_sku = #{sellerSku}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO amz_replenishment_override (sid, seller_sku, manual_purchased_qty, product_category, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{sid}, #{sellerSku}, #{manualPurchasedQty}, #{productCategory}, NOW(), NOW()) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE manual_purchased_qty = VALUES(manual_purchased_qty), product_category = VALUES(product_category), update_time = NOW()
